name: Super Anti-Kaiju War Machine Mecha-Thunder-King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>用</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>決</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>メカサンダー・キング
name_jp_tl: Mecha-Thunder-King, the Anti-Kaiju Final Battle Weapon
desc: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; banish 1 "Kaiju" monster you control that is owned by your opponent, then, you can Special Summon 1 monster from your GY. You can only control 1 "Kaiju" monster. This card is unaffected by other "Kaiju" cards' effects, also it cannot be destroyed by battle with a "Kaiju" monster. During your End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Super Anti-Kaiju War Machine Mecha-Thunder-King" once per Duel.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
